title: Enchantment Preservation
description: Adds stones that can store your equipment’s enchantments, so you don't lose them on break.
body: # Enchantment Preservation This mod adds stones you can add to your equipment. They then store enchantments you put on that equipment (up to a certain configurable number) and drop, when the tool breaks, so you can add them to a different tool. You can also make it so equipment is only enchantable, if it has a stone attached. ![enchanting tool with stone image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/505/954/310/172/enchanted_axe_with_stone_table.PNG) []() Rad233 made some alternate textures, which you can find [here](https://github.com/TrueHorse/Enchantment-Preservation/issues/5).
